events.headline: I got a speeding ticket for a car I sold years ago because the buyer never transferred the title. What do I do?
events.summary: A car owner received a speeding ticket for a vehicle they no longer own due to the buyer failing to transfer the title. This situation highlights issues in vehicle ownership transfer processes and potential legal/administrative complications.
